_meta.description: Evaluation of three 1699-cleric Bible-book summaries against the actual KJV text (in ./books). Each book scored 1-5 (1 worst, 5 best) on correctness (fidelity to the book's actual content), style (how authentically it sounds like a real cleric of 1699), and completeness (whether the important events/themes are touched).

overall_character.Deepseek: Concise, elegant archaic prose; one paragraph per book; reliably accurate; covers highlights but rarely exhaustive.
overall_character.Gemini: Strongest 1699-cleric persona (London, Great Fire of 1666, anti-popery, Socinians/deists); rich applied divinity but often light on narrative events; several OCR/typo artifacts lower polish.
overall_character.Kimi-k: Most detailed and event-by-event, dense KJV quotation, highest factual/completeness fidelity; period-authentic but reads as scripture paraphrase rather than personal cleric commentary.

Deepseek.note: Creation, Fall, Flood, Patriarchs, Joseph all correct; omits Cain/Abel and Babel but covers the arc well.

Gemini.note: Protoevangelium and covenant well handled; heavily theological, omits Flood/Babel/Cain; 'transportless' is a garbled word.

Kimi-k.note: Thorough: Eden, Cain, Flood/8 souls, Babel, Ur, Moriah, Jacob/Israel, Joseph, death at 110. Reads as paraphrase.

Deepseek.note: Deliverance, Passover, Red Sea, Sinai, Tabernacle correct; omits golden calf.

Gemini.note: Strong typology (Moses as type of Christ, Tabernacle as Church); narrative thin, no plagues/calf detail.

Kimi-k.note: Burning bush, ten plagues, Red Sea, manna, Sinai, golden calf, Tabernacle reared, cloud/fire — comprehensive.

Deepseek.note: Sacrifices, priesthood, clean/unclean, feasts, holiness motto; sound, fairly full for a short note.

Gemini.note: Excellent cleric framing (Christ as antitype of sacrifices) and Great-Fire aside; lists little of the actual content.

Kimi-k.note: Names the five offerings, Day of Atonement, leprosy, feasts, jubilee — closely tracks the book.

Deepseek.note: Census, murmuring, 40 years, Korah, Meribah, Balaam — well chosen highlights.

Gemini.note: Brazen-serpent typology apt; calls it 'Wilderness of Sinai' (loosely; wandering was in Paran/Zin); few events.

Kimi-k.note: Census, spies, Korah swallowed, Miriam's death, Moses' rock sin, Balaam's ass, Zelophehad — very full.

Deepseek.note: Restatement of Law, Shema, death on Nebo; accurate and clear.

Gemini.note: Fine on the 'Prophet like unto me' and exhortation; light on the blessings/curses structure.

Kimi-k.note: Recap of Law, Ebal/Gerizim blessings and curses, song, charge to Joshua, Pisgah, death at 120 — thorough.

Deepseek.note: Jordan, Jericho, Ai, division, Shechem covenant — solid.

Gemini.note: Lovely 'Joshua=Saviour' typology; conquest compressed, omits sun standing still and Achan.

Kimi-k.note: Jordan, Jericho, Achan, Ai, sun at Gibeon, five kings, lot-division, refuge cities, Shechem — comprehensive.

Deepseek.note: Cycle of apostasy, Deborah/Gideon/Jephthah/Samson, closing refrain — accurate.

Gemini.note: Vivid application to the 'late Great Rebellion'; names fewer judges, omits the grim closing chapters.

Kimi-k.note: Othniel, Ehud, Deborah, Gideon's ephod, Abimelech, Jephthah's vow, Samson, Levite's concubine — very full.

Deepseek.note: Loyalty, Boaz the redeemer, Davidic/Messianic line — well captured.

Gemini.note: Adds apt Gentile-inclusion theology; covers the story well.

Kimi-k.note: Famine, Moab, Orpah/Ruth, the 'whither thou goest' vow, gleaning, redemption, Obed-Jesse-David — complete.

Deepseek.note: Samuel's birth, demand for a king, Saul's rejection, David's rise — accurate.

Gemini.note: Warm personal voice on Goliath; omits Eli's sons, the ark capture, Saul's death.

Kimi-k.note: Hannah, Eli's sons, ark/emerods, Saul/Agag, David anointed, Goliath, cave sparings, Gilboa — comprehensive.

Deepseek.note: Reign, Jerusalem, ark, Davidic covenant, Bathsheba, Absalom — well balanced.

Gemini.note: Good repentance theme (Ps 51 link); 'warnings-piece' is garbled; omits Nathan, Amnon, census.

Kimi-k.note: Hebron, Jerusalem, ark, covenant, Bathsheba/Uriah, 'Thou art the man', Amnon/Absalom, Sheba, census/Araunah — full.

Deepseek.note: Solomon, Temple, apostasy, division, Elijah at Carmel — accurate.

Gemini.note: Strong voice; covers Solomon's wisdom and fall, schism, Elijah well.

Kimi-k.note: Adonijah, two harlots, Temple, strange wives, Rehoboam/Jeroboam's calves, Elijah/ravens/Zarephath/Carmel — full.

Deepseek.note: Elijah's translation, Elisha, decline, Josiah, fall of Samaria and Jerusalem — accurate.

Gemini.note: Vivid St-Paul's/Great-Fire analogy for the burned Temple; covers both captivities.

Kimi-k.note: Chariot of fire, Naaman, Jehu, fall of Israel, Hezekiah/sundial, Manasseh, Josiah, Nebuchadnezzar — comprehensive.

Deepseek.note: Genealogies, David's reign, Temple preparations, Levitical order — accurate.

Gemini.note: Rightly notes the book's focus on public worship over David's private sins.

Kimi-k.note: Genealogies, Gilboa, ark from Kirjathjearim, Uzza, conquests, covenant, Temple materials — full.

Deepseek.note: Kings of Judah, reformers, captivity, Cyrus decree — accurate.

Gemini.note: Apt application to England's 'true Protestant religion'; covers reforming kings.

Kimi-k.note: Solomon/Sheba, schism, Shishak, Asa, Jehoshaphat, Hezekiah/Sennacherib, Josiah, 70-year sabbaths — full.

Deepseek.note: Return under Cyrus, Temple rebuilt, Ezra's reform, strange wives put away.

Gemini.note: Good 'reformation of a decayed Church' framing; solid coverage.

Kimi-k.note: Cyrus decree quoted, Zerubbabel/Jeshua, opposition, Darius, Ezra's commission, strange wives — full.

Deepseek.note: Wall rebuilt in 52 days against Sanballat/Tobiah, Law read, reforms — accurate.

Gemini.note: Memorable 'trowel and sword' emblem; covers the substance well.

Kimi-k.note: Cupbearer, night survey, building under threat, 52 days, Law read, covenant sealed, dedication — full.

Deepseek.note: God unnamed yet providential, Haman's plot, deliverance, Purim — accurate.

Gemini.note: Nice 'snared in their own work' moral; calls Mordecai 'uncle' (commonly cousin/guardian).

Kimi-k.note: Vashti, virgins, Esther, Haman, sceptre, banquets, the king's sleepless night, gallows, Purim — full.

Deepseek.note: Suffering, three friends, whirlwind, repentance, twofold restoration — accurate.

Gemini.note: Moving pastoral application; 'in his ashes he layout his faith' is garbled; light on the structure.

Kimi-k.note: Satan's wager, losses, wife, friends, Elihu, whirlwind/Behemoth/Leviathan, restoration — full and accurate.

Deepseek.note: 150 psalms, Davidic/Asaph authorship, range of devotion — accurate.

Gemini.note: Beautiful 'anatomy of the Christian soul'; ties to cathedral use; fitting.

Kimi-k.note: Cites Pss 51, 23, 22, 2, 110, messianic suffering/exaltation — richest treatment.

Deepseek.note: Solomonic wisdom, fear of the Lord, strange woman, virtuous woman — accurate.

Gemini.note: Vivid London-streets application; less of the book's actual content listed.

Kimi-k.note: Wisdom crying out, fear of the Lord, soft answer, sluggard, virtuous woman, the seven things hated — full.

Deepseek.note: Vanity, search under the sun, fear God conclusion — accurate.

Gemini.note: Good 'penitential sermon of Solomon's old age' framing; brief on content.

Kimi-k.note: Vanity, seasons, two-better-than-one, remember thy Creator, dust/spirit return, the conclusion — full.

Deepseek.note: Christ/Church allegory, 'many waters cannot quench love' — accurate for the era.

Gemini.note: Period-perfect chaste allegorical reading; well expressed.

Kimi-k.note: Allegory plus many actual lines (kisses, 'all fair', 'my beloved is mine', love strong as death) — full.

Deepseek.note: Kings dated, judgment, Immanuel/Suffering Servant, new heavens — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Fifth Evangelist' and anti-Socinian framing apt; narrower on the book's breadth.

Kimi-k.note: Sinful nation, Assyria/Babylon, child born, suffering servant, fall of Babylon, new heavens, woes — full.

Deepseek.note: Called from the womb, Babylon, persecution/dungeon, new covenant — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Iron pillar' imagery and new-covenant focus strong; fewer events.

Kimi-k.note: Called from womb, broken cisterns, potter, 70 years, letter to captives, new covenant, dungeon, fall — full.

Deepseek.note: Five acrostic elegies, 'great is Thy faithfulness' — accurate.

Gemini.note: Powerful 1666 parallel; 'patterns of contrition' is a typo for 'pattern'.

Kimi-k.note: Opens with the actual text, weaves 3:22-26 and the closing — rich and faithful.

Deepseek.note: Chariot-throne, judgment, new heart, dry bones, restored Temple — accurate.

Gemini.note: Glory departing/returning and dry bones well handled in cleric voice.

Kimi-k.note: Chebar vision, eating the roll, siege-acting, Tammuz, shepherd, dry bones, new temple/waters — full.

Deepseek.note: Court tales and apocalyptic visions, Son of Man, resurrection — accurate.

Gemini.note: Strong anti-infidel framing; 'mathematical certainty' on the 70 weeks is an interpretive overstatement.

Kimi-k.note: Pulse, the image, furnace, the writing on the wall, lions' den, four beasts, 70 weeks — full.

Deepseek.note: Unfaithful wife as Israel, call to repentance, betrothal in righteousness — accurate.

Gemini.note: Tender mercy theme good; 'mixtureth' is a coinage/typo.

Kimi-k.note: Gomer, 'sow wind reap whirlwind', 'how shall I give thee up', return/lily — well quoted.

Deepseek.note: Locusts, Day of the Lord, rend your hearts, Spirit poured out — accurate.

Gemini.note: Rightly links the outpouring to Pentecost; good coverage.

Kimi-k.note: Locusts, rend-your-heart, Spirit on all flesh, sun to darkness/moon to blood — full.

Deepseek.note: Herdsman of Tekoa, social injustice, famine of the word, tabernacle of David — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Sell the poor for a pair of shoes' and justice-as-stream well used.

Kimi-k.note: Oracles against nations, judgment-as-waters, plumbline, summer fruit, raised tabernacle — full.

Deepseek.note: Edom's pride and judgment, saviours on Zion — full for so short a book.

Gemini.note: Captures Edom's standing-aloof and the reversal succinctly.

Kimi-k.note: Pride of the rock-dweller, eagle's nest, the day of the Lord, Zion's deliverance — full.

Deepseek.note: Flight, fish, Nineveh's repentance, the rebuke — accurate.

Gemini.note: Rightly notes the resurrection 'sign'; covers the arc.

Kimi-k.note: Flight, lots, cast into sea, fish, prayer, preaching, repentance, gourd lesson — full.

Deepseek.note: Oppression denounced, Bethlehem prophecy, 'do justly, love mercy' — accurate.

Gemini.note: Bethlehem prophecy and the 'golden words' well handled.

Kimi-k.note: Samaria/Jerusalem, coveting fields, Bethlehem Ephratah, 6:8, sins cast into the sea — full.

Deepseek.note: Burden of Nineveh, slow to anger yet just, fall of the city — accurate.

Gemini.note: Comfort-to-the-Church angle apt; covers the theme.

Kimi-k.note: Jealous/avenging God, whirlwind, opened river-gates, the harlot-city, no healing — full.

Deepseek.note: Dialogue, Chaldeans raised up, 'just shall live by faith', closing song — accurate.

Gemini.note: Rightly highlights 'the just shall live by faith' as a Protestant cornerstone.

Kimi-k.note: Complaint, Chaldeans, faith, the woes, 'earth filled with knowledge', rejoicing song — full.

Deepseek.note: Day of wrath, searching Jerusalem with candles, then the song of joy — accurate.

Gemini.note: Malcham/strange-apparel detail shows close reading; good coverage.

Kimi-k.note: Consuming the land, Baal/Chemarims, day of wrath, 'seek the Lord', rejoicing over thee — full.

Deepseek.note: Rebuke for neglect, latter house glory, Zerubbabel/Joshua — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Ceiled houses' detail and Christ-entering fulfilment well noted.

Kimi-k.note: Consider-your-ways, build the house, shaking of nations, signet of Zerubbabel — full.

Deepseek.note: Night visions, coming King on an ass, smitten Shepherd, pierced one — accurate.

Gemini.note: Messianic detail (30 pieces, piercing, fountain) shows real knowledge of the text.

Kimi-k.note: Myrtle horses, horns, measuring line, Joshua, candlestick, Branch, pierced one, Mount of Olives — full.

Deepseek.note: Polluted offerings, divorce, tithes, Elijah to come — accurate.

Gemini.note: Sun of Righteousness and Baptist-as-Elijah well handled.

Kimi-k.note: Jacob loved/Esau hated, corrupt priests, putting away, the messenger, tithes, Sun of Righteousness — full.

Deepseek.note: Genealogy, Sermon, parables, Passion/Resurrection, Great Commission — accurate.

Gemini.note: Good Jewish-fulfilment framing; compresses the narrative considerably.

Kimi-k.note: Genealogy, magi, Herod, Egypt, baptism, temptation, Sermon, parables, Peter's confession, Passion — full.

Deepseek.note: Brief/urgent, suffering Servant, authority over demons/disease/death — accurate.

Gemini.note: Petrine-source tradition noted; few specific episodes.

Kimi-k.note: John, baptism, calling fishermen, feeding 5000, confession, transfiguration, Passion, Magdalene — full.

Deepseek.note: Theophilus, nativity canticles, Good Samaritan/Prodigal, Emmaus, friend of sinners — accurate.

Gemini.note: Beloved-physician/Gentile-light framing apt; lighter on episodes.

Kimi-k.note: Baptist's birth, annunciation, manger, Nazareth sermon, parables, last supper, ascension — full.

Deepseek.note: Logos prologue, I AM sayings, Lazarus, high-priestly prayer, purpose statement — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Eagle-winged' framing excellent; 'soarers' is a typo for 'soareth'; thin on episodes.

Kimi-k.note: Prologue, Cana, Nicodemus, Samaritan woman, I AMs, Lazarus, foot-washing, Passion, Thomas — full.

Deepseek.note: Pentecost, Stephen, Saul's conversion, journeys, Rome — accurate.

Gemini.note: Good 'pattern for our reformed Church' framing; compresses the journeys.

Kimi-k.note: Ascension, Pentecost, lame man, Stephen, eunuch, Damascus road, Cornelius, Mars' hill, shipwreck, Rome — full.

Deepseek.note: All have sinned, justification by faith, election, living sacrifice — accurate.

Gemini.note: Solid Reformed reading of justification, imputation, election.

Kimi-k.note: Gospel as power, all sinned, propitiation, Abraham, Spirit's witness, living sacrifice — full and apt.

Deepseek.note: Divisions, marriage/idol-meat, Supper, charity, resurrection — accurate.

Gemini.note: Notes the burial-office use of ch.15; covers the issues.

Kimi-k.note: Parties (Paul/Apollos/Cephas), cross's foolishness, Supper words, charity, resurrection victory — full.

Deepseek.note: Defence of apostleship, sufferings, thorn, giving, unequal yoke — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Treasure in earthen vessels' and strength-in-weakness well drawn.

Kimi-k.note: God of comfort, new creature, reconciliation, earthen vessels, light affliction, collection — full.

Deepseek.note: Liberty vs circumcision, justification by faith, fruit of the Spirit — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Bulwark of Christian Liberty against Popery' is a perfect 1699 framing.

Kimi-k.note: Another gospel, Paul's calling, curse of the law, fulness of time, stand fast in liberty — full.

Deepseek.note: Eternal purpose, grace through faith, Church as body, armour of God — accurate.

Gemini.note: Election/adoption and armour well handled; 'soarers' typo recurs.

Kimi-k.note: Spiritual blessings, chosen before foundation, dead-then-quickened, grace through faith, armour — full.

Deepseek.note: Joy from prison, kenosis hymn, press toward the mark — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'To live is Christ, to die is gain' and the humility-pattern well used.

Kimi-k.note: Fellowship, furtherance of gospel, the great kenosis text, pressing to the mark, supply of need — full.

Deepseek.note: Supremacy of Christ, warning against philosophy, things above — accurate.

Gemini.note: Fulness of the Godhead and peace by the blood well captured.

Kimi-k.note: Image of God, firstborn, all things created by Him, beware philosophy, risen with Christ — full.

Deepseek.note: Earliest epistle, dead in Christ rise, caught up, exhortations — accurate.

Gemini.note: Comfort about those asleep and the rapture well handled.

Kimi-k.note: Faith/love/hope, gospel in power, the descent/trump, dead in Christ rise first — full.

Deepseek.note: Day of the Lord not yet come, falling away, man of sin, stand fast — accurate.

Gemini.note: Identifies the Man of Sin with the Roman Papacy — quintessentially 1699 Protestant.

Kimi-k.note: Persecutions, falling away, man of sin/son of perdition, consumed by His coming, withdraw from disorderly — full.

Deepseek.note: Church order, bishops/deacons, false teachers, 'Christ came to save sinners' — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Love of money the root of all evil' and office qualifications well noted.

Kimi-k.note: No other doctrine, charity, faithful saying, prayer everywhere, bishop's work, example to believers — full.

Deepseek.note: Final imprisonment, 'preach the word', 'fought a good fight', crown — accurate.

Gemini.note: Vivid 'cold dungeon... axe of Nero'; covers the charge well.

Kimi-k.note: Lois/Eunice, spirit not of fear, all scripture inspired, preach the word, the finished course — full.

Deepseek.note: Crete, ordaining elders, sound doctrine, grace teaching sober living — accurate.

Gemini.note: Grace-that-brings-salvation and blessed hope well handled.

Kimi-k.note: Crete, elder qualifications, aged men/women, grace appeared, washing of regeneration — full.

Deepseek.note: Onesimus the runaway, brother-not-servant, Paul's offer to repay — full.

Gemini.note: Model of Christian courtesy; covers the whole short letter.

Kimi-k.note: Onesimus begotten in bonds, once unprofitable now profitable, 'put it on mine account' — full.

Deepseek.note: Christ above angels/Moses/priesthood, better covenant, roll-call of faith — accurate.

Gemini.note: Superiority of Christ and eternal High Priest well drawn.

Kimi-k.note: Spoken by His Son, brightness of glory, above angels, impossible to please without faith, boldness to enter — full.

Deepseek.note: Faith without works dead, pure religion, the tongue, fervent prayer — accurate.

Gemini.note: Sharp on faith-and-works against bare faith; 'bridleing' is a typo.

Kimi-k.note: Count it joy, ask wisdom, doers not hearers, Abraham/Isaac, faith without works dead, fervent prayer — full.

Deepseek.note: Chosen generation/royal priesthood, suffering, roaring lion, feed the flock — accurate.

Gemini.note: Fiery-trial endurance and 'fear God, honour the King' well noted.

Kimi-k.note: Elect, lively hope, redeemed by precious blood, the just for the unjust, crown of glory — full.

Deepseek.note: Grow in grace, false teachers, scoffers, elements melt, new heavens — accurate.

Gemini.note: Scripture's certainty and the thief-in-the-night day well handled.

Kimi-k.note: All things for godliness, the chain of virtues, false teachers, day as a thief, grow in grace — full.

Deepseek.note: God is light/love, perfect love casts out fear, tests of faith — accurate.

Gemini.note: Marks of passing from death to life and 'God is love' well drawn.

Kimi-k.note: Word of life handled, God is light, confess sins, love the brethren, His Spirit witness — full.

Deepseek.note: Elect lady, walk in truth, deceivers denying Christ in flesh, receive them not — full.

Gemini.note: Captures the whole brief letter accurately.

Kimi-k.note: Elect lady, love one another, antichrist deceivers, receive not, full reward — full.

Deepseek.note: Gaius's hospitality, Demetrius vs Diotrephes, follow good — full.

Gemini.note: Diotrephes-the-preeminence-lover well captured.

Kimi-k.note: Gaius's health/truth, no greater joy, Diotrephes, Demetrius's good report — full.

Deepseek.note: Contend for the faith, crept-in ungodly men, OT judgments, doxology — accurate.

Gemini.note: 'Filthy dreamers' turning grace to lasciviousness well drawn; omits the OT examples.

Kimi-k.note: Contend for the faith, crept-in men, clouds without water/wandering stars, the doxology — full.

Deepseek.note: Seven churches, seals/trumpets/vials, Lamb's triumph, New Jerusalem — accurate.

Gemini.note: Identifies mystical Babylon with the Papacy — characteristically 1699 Protestant; well done.

Kimi-k.note: Son of man among candlesticks, seven seals, four horsemen, trumpets, dragon, beast, vials, Gog/Magog, New Jerusalem — full.
